message.content:
Search for examples in the custom addons where list views have BOTH:
1. editable="bottom" for inline editing
2. Some kind of action/link/button to open a detailed form

Specifically look for:
- Widget-based solutions (like activity_ids widget)
- Handle widgets
- Special field types that render as links/buttons
- Any custom widgets that might be defined

Search in all modules under X:\03_ACG\Custom_Addons\ for patterns with:
- Lists that are editable but also have clickable elements
- Field widgets that provide both editing and navigation
- Examples of "name" fields with widget="handle" or similar

Report concrete examples with file paths and code.

Perfect! I have gathered comprehensive information. Let me compile the findings into a detailed report.

## Summary of Findings

I found **30+ concrete examples** in the custom addons where list views combine **editable="bottom"** with various action/button/widget patterns for navigation and editing. Here are the key patterns and specific examples:

---

## Pattern 1: widget="handle" (Drag-and-Drop Reordering)

This is the most common pattern combining editable lists with interactive elements:

**File:** `X:\03_ACG\Custom_Addons\activity_modification\views\mail_activity_views.xml`
```xml
<list string="Subject lines" editable="bottom" create="1" default_order="sequence, id">
    <field name="sequence" widget="handle"/>
    <field name="name" string="Subject / fragment"/>
</list>
```

**File:** `X:\03_ACG\Custom_Addons\contacts_subcontractor_requirements\views\subcontractor_requirement_template_views.xml`
```xml
<list string="Subcontractor requirements (global)" editable="bottom" decoration-muted="not active">
    <field name="sequence" widget="handle"/>
    <field name="name"/>
    <field name="active" widget="boolean_toggle" optional="show"/>
    <field name="optional"/>
    <field name="description" optional="show"/>
</list>
```

**File:** `X:\03_ACG\Custom_Addons\hr_recruitment_enhanced\views\hr_job_checklist_template_views.xml`
```xml
<list editable="bottom">
    <field name="sequence" widget="handle"/>
    <field name="job_id" optional="show"/>
    <field name="name"/>
    <field name="upload_by" optional="show"/>
    <field name="status" decoration-info="status == 'draft'" optional="show"/>
    <field name="sharepoint_url" widget="url" optional="show"/>
</list>
```

---

## Pattern 2: Button Elements in Editable Lists

**File:** `X:\03_ACG\Custom_Addons\contact_style\views\meeting.xml`
```xml
<list string="Meetings" editable="bottom">
    <field name="meeting_date"/>
    <field name="meeting_topic"/>
    <field name="meeting_notes"/>
    <field name="acg_participants" string="ACG Participants" widget="many2many_tags"/>
    <field name="external_participants" string="External Participants" widget="many2many_tags"/>
    <button name="action_view_meeting_form" type="object" string="View" width="80px" />
</list>
```

**File:** `X:\03_ACG\Custom_Addons\project_custom_fields\views\meeting.xml` (identical pattern)

**File:** `X:\03_ACG\Custom_Addons\bd_sourcesought\views\bd_sourcesought_lead_views.xml`
```xml
<list create="1" default_order="date_deadline asc, id desc" editable="bottom"
      decoration-bf="activity_type_id.category == 'meeting'"
      decoration-danger="date_deadline < current_date and custom_state != 'done'">
    <button name="action_open_as_wizard" type="object" string="Open" class="btn-primary"
            context="{'form_view_ref': 'mail.mail_activity_view_form_popup', 'target': 'new'}"/>
    <field name="activity_type_id"/>
    <field name="summary"/>
    <field name="date_deadline"/>
    <field name="user_id"/>
    <field name="custom_state" widget="selection_toggle"/>
</list>
```

---

## Pattern 3: URL Widgets in Editable Lists

These allow clickable link navigation directly in the list:

**File:** `X:\03_ACG\Custom_Addons\hr_recruitment_enhanced\views\hr_applicant_checklist_item_views.xml`
```xml
<list editable="bottom">
    <field name="sequence" widget="handle"/>
    <field name="applicant_id" optional="show"/>
    <field name="name"/>
    <field name="upload_by" optional="show"/>
    <field name="template_attachment_filename" optional="show" string="Template Doc"/>
    <field name="result_attachment_filename" optional="show" string="Result Doc"/>
    <field name="sharepoint_url" widget="url" optional="hide"/>
    <field name="template_attachment_count" optional="hide" string="Template Files"/>
    <field name="result_attachment_count" optional="hide" string="Result Files"/>
    <field name="completed" widget="boolean_toggle"/>
</list>
```

**File:** `X:\03_ACG\Custom_Addons\hr_recruitment_enhanced\views\hr_job_checklist_template_views.xml`
```xml
<field name="sharepoint_url" widget="url" optional="show"/>
```

---

## Pattern 4: many2many_binary and many2many_tags Widgets

**File:** `X:\03_ACG\Custom_Addons\contacts_subcontractor_requirements\views\res_partner_views.xml`
```xml
<list editable="bottom" create="false" delete="false">
    <field name="sequence" widget="handle"/>
    <field name="name" readonly="1"/>
    <field name="description" optional="show" readonly="1"/>
    <field name="is_optional" readonly="1" optional="show" string="Optional"/>
    <field name="done" widget="boolean_toggle"/>
    <field name="not_applicable" widget="boolean_toggle" string="N/A"/>
    <field name="attachment_ids" widget="many2many_binary" optional="show"/>
</list>
```

**File:** `X:\03_ACG\Custom_Addons\contacts_subcontractor_requirements\views\crm_lead_subcontractor_views.xml`
```xml
<list editable="bottom" create="false" delete="false">
    <field name="sequence" widget="handle"/>
    <field name="name" readonly="1"/>
    <field name="is_optional" readonly="1" optional="show"/>
    <field name="partner_attachment_ids" widget="many2many_binary" readonly="1" optional="show" string="Contact Attachments"/>
    <field name="lead_attachment_ids" widget="many2many_binary" string="Lead Attachments"/>
</list>
```

---

## Pattern 5: Action Buttons in Lists (type="action")

**File:** `X:\03_ACG\Custom_Addons\ticket_system\views\ticket_update_view.xml`
```xml
<field name="update_line_ids" nolabel="1">
    <list editable="bottom">
        <button name="%(action_open_schedule_update)d" type="action" icon="fa-external-link" title="Open in popup"/>
        <field name="schedule_id" column_invisible="1"/>
        <field name="date"/>
        <field name="user_id" readonly="1"/>
        <field name="note"/>
    </list>
</field>
```

**File:** `X:\03_ACG\Custom_Addons\ticket_system\views\ticket_update_view.xml` (mail.activity context)
```xml
<field name="update_line_ids" nolabel="1">
    <list editable="bottom">
        <field name="activity_id" column_invisible="1"/>
        <field name="date" string="Date"/>
        <field name="user_id" string="User" readonly="1"/>
        <field name="note" string="Update Note"/>
        <field name="notify_creator" string="Notify Creator" widget="boolean_toggle" optional="show"/>
        <field name="attachment_ids" string="Attachments" widget="many2many_binary" optional="show"/>
        <button name="%(action_open_activity_update)d" type="action" icon="fa-external-link" string="" title="Open in popup"/>
    </list>
</field>
```

---

## Pattern 6: boolean_toggle and Other Specialty Widgets

**File:** `X:\03_ACG\Custom_Addons\crm_custom_fields\views\appointment_view.xml`
```xml
<list string="Appointment Types" editable="bottom">
    <field name="name"/>
    <field name="color" widget="color_index"/>
</list>
```

**File:** `X:\03_ACG\Custom_Addons\hr_recruitment_enhanced\views\hr_job_phone_screen_question_views.xml`
```xml
<list editable="bottom">
    <field name="sequence" widget="handle"/>
    <field name="is_template" widget="boolean_toggle"/>
    <field name="job_id" optional="show"/>
    <field name="question"/>
    <field name="question_type"/>
    <field name="expected_answer" optional="hide"/>
    <field name="is_mandatory"/>
</list>
```

---

## Pattern 7: selection_toggle and Decorated States

**File:** `X:\03_ACG\Custom_Addons\bd_sourcesought\views\bd_sourcesought_lead_views.xml`
```xml
<field name="custom_state" widget="selection_toggle"
       decoration-info="custom_state == 'planned'"
       decoration-danger="custom_state == 'cancelled'"/>
```
